title: Project Miner Local PM Intake Constraint Context Exports
objective: Reduce PM-to-executor and AI-to-AI relay burden by carrying the browser-local constraint radar into the existing PM Brief and Executor Handoff exports, while preserving that this is context-only export extension and not a new export action, handoff artifact, approval, persistence, import, issue, task, work authorization, assignment, schedule, status, durable field record, production tracking write, hosted parity proof, or production mutation.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Export-Context Implementer
implemented_scope: Add the Local PM Intake Constraint Radar context to the existing Export PM Brief download.
Add the Local PM Intake Constraint Radar context to the existing Export Executor Handoff download.
Preserve the existing PM Brief and Executor Handoff buttons, filenames, and browser-local download behavior.
Add focused smoke coverage proving both downloads include source/review, field-prep, executor/hosted, and future write-authority constraint lines after local state changes.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
export_context_sections: Local PM Constraint Radar in the PM Brief
PM Constraint Radar in the Executor Handoff
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Use one read-only sidecar scout for PM Lane 074 scope review.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
validation_steps: rg -n "selected recipient|handoff created|assigned|scheduled|ready for execution|ready for field|field ready|field log of record|hosted parity proven|approval ready|packet admitted|daily report|tracking system|percent complete|released|cleared|approved|accepted|authorized|go/no-go passed|dispatch|dispatched|customer confirmed|JHA complete|LOTO approved|material released|issue created|task created|work order|production-ready" apps/operations-web/app/pm-review/import-intake/page.tsx apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
